summary: Implementation is functionally correct and all tests pass, but two issues require fixes before approval: (1) TypeScript type error in server.ts POST /state/track handler — `payload.issueId` accessed on `object` type without narrowing; (2) Missing integration test for the acceptance criterion 'untracked issue changes state → no changed entry emitted in poll cycle delta'.

findings.description: TypeScript error: Property 'issueId' does not exist on type 'object' at server.ts:1632,1635. The `request.json()` return is typed as `unknown`, narrowed to `object` by the typeof check, but TypeScript still cannot access `.issueId` without a type assertion or proper narrowing.

Acceptance criterion 'Integration test: untracked issue changes state → no changed entry emitted in the poll cycle delta' has no corresponding integration test in server.test.ts. The unit tests in state-delta.test.ts cover the filtering logic, and the materialized endpoint test verifies untracked issues don't appear there, but no test verifies that the Envoy publish delta omits changed entries for untracked issues.

unitTests.stateDelta: 26 pass, 0 fail — all 8 trackedIssueIds cases covered
unitTests.server: 165 pass, 0 fail — 16 new tracking endpoint tests pass

testResults.fullSuite: 1313 pass, 2 fail (pre-existing: packages/envoy/infra/__tests__/nats.test.ts and services.test.ts — @pulumi/docker missing, unrelated to this PR)

specCompliance.deltaFiltering: 4/5 covered (missing integration test for untracked→no changed delta)

strengths: 8 unit tests for computeStateDelta with trackedIssueIds cover all spec cases: undefined (backward compat), empty set, populated set, new-always-flows, filtered changed, filtered removed
16 integration tests for tracking endpoints cover all CRUD operations with idempotency and validation
Existing tests correctly updated to track issues before expecting changed delta entries
Tests for auto-track on POST /workers and auto-untrack in cleanupDoneIssueWorkers
weaknesses: Missing integration test: untracked issue state change → no changed entry in Envoy publish delta (the key behavioral guarantee of this feature)
